subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant and firm in the Testament! Give thanks unto the Almighty, the Ever-Living, the Self-Subsisting, that from the beginning of the Cause, the wine [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر عهد راسخ بر میثاق شکر کن حضرت مقتدر حی قیومرا که از بدو امر رحیق
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @twin Manifestations, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
